required_evidence: A stored thread search uses sort=updated.
The returned source_updated_at orders issue 2 ahead of issue 1.
scenarios.critical_discriminator: Default relevance ranks the older title match first; newest intent requires explicit updated ordering.
scenarios.tempting_wrong_path: Use default relevance and call its first result newest.

scenarios.correct_conclusion: The indexed README documents MIDI support, subject to code-index coverage.
required_evidence: README evidence comes from corpus.search_code, not repository metadata ranking.
The response reports whether the selected code snapshot was truncated.
scenarios.critical_discriminator: Repository description absence is not evidence that README documentation is absent.
scenarios.tempting_wrong_path: Search only repository names and descriptions, then answer no.

scenarios.correct_conclusion: Return the stored dossier and its persisted as-of value without regeneration.
required_evidence: No build, sync, or GitHub tool is called.
scenarios.critical_discriminator: The current repository projection can be newer than the persisted dossier; a read must not silently rebuild it.
